title: Build MAP Decision/Authority System (decision classes, authority hierarchy)
description: Per Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md priority #4: shared/decisions.md records decisions well but does not formally define who can decide what, what requires human approval, what a core agent can decide, what a helper can only recommend, what a local model can never decide, how decisions are superseded, and how proposals get promoted to binding decisions. Build MAP_System/DECISION_AUTHORITY_SYSTEM.md and MAP_System/DECISION_CLASSES.md. Must cross-link shared/hpom.md (authority tiers this formalizes for the decision-making task shape specifically), SELF_REPAIR_SYSTEM.md (STRUCTURAL repairs already require this authority path), RESEARCH_SYSTEM.md (research summaries feeding decisions), and shared/decisions.md itself (the log this governs). Register all output_paths upfront including any cross-linked file edits.
acceptance_criteria: MAP_System/DECISION_AUTHORITY_SYSTEM.md exists and defines who can decide what, human-approval requirements, core-agent decision rights, helper recommend-only limits, local-model never-decide limits, supersession rules, and proposal-to-decision promotion
MAP_System/DECISION_CLASSES.md exists and defines a small set of decision classes (e.g. architecture, ownership, authority, policy, scope) with the approval level each requires
DECISION_AUTHORITY_SYSTEM.md cross-links shared/hpom.md, SELF_REPAIR_SYSTEM.md, RESEARCH_SYSTEM.md, and shared/decisions.md
shared/decisions.md gets a new DECISION entry recording Decision/Authority System adoption
events/events.jsonl has PROGRESS/SUBMISSION entries tracing the build
